transcript.text: Hello, Bhavesh ji! Main Priya bol rahi hoon, Imagicaa Theme Park se. Aapne recently 20 April 2026 ke liye tickets cart mein add kiye the — 4 Adult, 2 Child ke liye. Booking complete nahi hui thi, toh socha aapko ek baar remind kar doon. Koi problem thi kya?
koi problem nahin hai per plan change ho gaya hai.
Achcha, plans change ho gaye? Koi baat nahi hai. Kya main jaan sakti hoon ki kya changes aaye hain?
Sorry, kya aap mujhse baat kar rahe the?
तो उनसे ही बात कर रहा था।
Achcha. Toh, kya aap abhi booking confirm karna chahte hain? Ya baad mein plan karenge?
